pi_items.source: task.json instructions and verifier.py expected value
task.json instructions, env setup scripts (install_adaudit_plus.ps1, setup_adaudit_plus.ps1) configure port 8081
task.json instructions, install_adaudit_plus.ps1 explicitly sets password to Admin@2024 for admin user

privileged_info_summary: The ADAudit Plus web console is accessible at http://localhost:8081. The administrator credentials are username 'admin' and password 'Admin@2024'. The task requires changing the Agent Port to 8555, disabling auto-install and auto-upgrade of agents, taking a screenshot to C:\workspace\agent_settings_evidence.png, and saving the port number to C:\workspace\agent_settings_summary.txt.
